gaps.description: src/store/index.js is a local module but architecture specifies agentic-store as an external package dependency
src/runtime/embed.js is a local module but architecture specifies agentic-embed as an external package dependency
src/detector/matcher.js not specified in architecture — only hardware.js, profiles.js, optimizer.js are listed
src/server/cert.js, httpsServer.js, middleware.js not specified in architecture — only hub.js, brain.js, api.js are listed
src/cli/ directory not specified in architecture — bin/agentic-service.js is the specified CLI entry point
agentic-sense (MediaPipe) not confirmed as external package — runtime/sense.js may be a local stub rather than wrapping the package
agentic-voice not confirmed as external package — runtime/stt.js and tts.js may be local stubs rather than wrapping the package
